title: stultitia miscella
intro: Stultitia miscella is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is also known as the "Mediterranean valerian" or " Valeriana glabra", but I was unable to find this name. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-anxiety and sedative effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions, such as insomnia, restlessness, and muscle spasms, and can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for oral consumption.
